items.name: ComfyUI-BRKN-Prompt-Randomizer
items.description: BRKN Lifestyle Prompt Composer is a modular ComfyUI prompt randomizer designed to turn reusable packs into fast, varied, and controlled image prompts. Users can combine a base pack with wardrobe, makeup, lighting, camera, location, action, and transportation packs, then generate consistent prompt variations without manually rebuilding each scene.
